name: ys-capital-portal
description: YS Capital borrower portal backend — Postgres + auth + notifications, serving the existing static site. ClickUp/Encompass sync layered on later.

scripts.test: node scripts/check-migrations.js && node scripts/test-clickup-transforms.js && node scripts/test-clickup-mapper.js && node scripts/test-clickup-write-guards.js && node scripts/test-clickup-delete-guard.js && node scripts/test-checklist-sync.js && node scripts/test-sync-autoresolve.js && node scripts/test-sync-file-review.js && node scripts/test-orchestrator-push-failures.js && node test/borrower-safe.test.js
